mapper.insert: insert into tbl_member (member_name, member_email, member_password) values (#{memberName}, #{memberEmail}, #{memberPassword})
mapper.select: select id, member_name, member_email, member_status, member_role, created_datetime, updated_datetime from tbl_member where member_email = #{memberEmail} and member_password = #{memberPassword} and member_status = 'active'

select id, member_name, member_email, member_password, member_email_verified, member_role, member_status, created_datetime, updated_datetime from tbl_member where member_email = #{memberEmail} and member_status = 'active'
